calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Caren P. Sencer, Esq. appeared with plaintiff David Hernandez, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Kim & Son Construction Co., Inc.
Default entered against defendant on February 27, 2007.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 14, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff David Hernandez, on his own behalf and on behalf of all those similarly situated, and against the Defaulted Defendant: Kim & Son Construction, Co., Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $499,872.10.
Prejudgment Interest - $88,691.56.
Attorney's Fees - $18,997.00.
Costs - $1,339.70, for a total of $608,900.36.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court for review no later than Friday, May 30, 2008.

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-03-2007 Continued To May-01-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Caren Sencer, Esq. for Plaintiff: David Hernandez and all those similarly situated.
Plaintiff's Witness: David Hernandez, present with Court Certified Spanish Interpreter: Angela Zawadzki, were sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court continued this matter to May 1, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
Counsel to submit the Point and Authority of the class action by Apr. 26, 2007
Appearance of Mr. Hernandez is waived.
